name: What if my boss fires me for complaining about bad air quality?

mainEntity.name: What if my boss fires me for complaining about bad air quality?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal retaliation—file OSHA complaint in 30 days for protection and damages[6].
acceptedAnswer.description: Retaliation is illegal under OSHA and state laws; you can file a complaint with OSHA within 30 days and pursue wrongful termination damages. Employers can't punish safety reports, and workers' comp protects job injury claims[2][6]. - Document complaints, performance, and firing details. - Seek unemployment and reinstatement. Report immediately to OSHA, file retaliation charge, and contact an attorney for backpay and job protection.

description: Illegal retaliation—file OSHA complaint in 30 days for protection and damages[6].
